entry.name: show_requestShutDown
entry.label: Show an option to shut down the system.

entry.name: show_requestReboot
entry.label: Show an option to reboot the system.

entry.name: show_lockScreen
entry.label: Show an option to lock the system.

entry.name: show_switchUser
entry.label: Show an option to switch user.

entry.name: show_suspendToDisk
entry.label: Show an option to suspend the system to disk (hibernate).

entry.name: show_suspendToRam
entry.label: Show an option to suspend the system suspend.

entry.name: workflowPollingInterval
entry.label: Workflow status polling interval in milliseconds.

entry.name: allowForceDefaultAction
entry.label: Allow forcing the default KDE action after workflow failure.

entry.name: proceedOnNonCriticalError
entry.label: Proceed automatically after a non-critical workflow error.

entry.name: nonCriticalErrorDelay
entry.label: Delay before proceeding after a non-critical workflow error.
